idea-plugin.name: QOI Image Support
idea-plugin.description:
Adds QOI (Quite OK Image) format support to IntelliJ-based IDEs.

Once installed, .qoi files are displayed in the built-in image viewer with full support for zooming, grid overlay, and other standard viewer features — no external tools required.

Features

  • View QOI images directly in the editor
  • Works with all IntelliJ-based IDEs (IntelliJ IDEA, GoLand, WebStorm, etc.)
  • Pure JVM implementation — no native dependencies
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.1

  • Replace deprecated internal API with ProjectActivity

1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • QOI image decoding and viewer integration
